original: a suit of ramshackle power armor
context: <<POS:05877636>> e.description='a suit of ramshackle power armor'

original: A suit of power armor put together by the hand of a cunning Galotian mercenary. Though it’s built on a cheap labor frame, the suit’s got quite a bit of armor and high-tech gadgetry bolted onto it, sealing the wearer in nigh-impervious armor plating and providing an advanced head’s-up display for targeting. It’s bulky and cumbersome, though, and sure isn’t pretty by anyone’s definition...
